---
name: Feature / Component Request
about: Suggest a new component or feature for AniUI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature or component you'd like.

## Use Case
Explain the problem this solves or the scenario where it's needed.

## Proposed API
```tsx
// How you'd like to use it
import { MyComponent } from "@/components/ui/my-component";

<MyComponent variant="default" />
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or components you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g., shadcn/ui equivalent).
